learning_outcomes.description: Effectively appraise, judge and defend analytic projects and champion organisational change for a range of stakeholders.
Design analytic projects aimed at high velocity industries and environments through practical approaches such as the business case, project plan, and test strategy.
Manage project group dynamics to achieve agreed ethical, financial, temporal, and organisational objectives and expectations.

assessments.due_date:
Pitch Video Submission - 5:00PM - 9/09/2026

Pitch Presentation and Q&A during Live Sessions. Week 7 - Week 8

Team pitches will be presented utilising the team’s video during live sessions.
assessments.task_description:
This is a group assessment. The assessment requires teams to:

  • Pitch a project management focused business case
  • Respond to Q&A and 
  • Complete peer assessment.

Groups will be formed over Weeks 1 and 2. The group size will depend on the number of enrolments for the semester.
assessments.submission_guidelines: Assessment will be submitted via the course's Learn.UQ site.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.task_description:
The business case pitched for Assessment 1 forms the base of your individual project plan that is at the centre of this assessment submission.

You will submit a business case, project plan and explain how you pivoted to respond to a disruptive event.
assessments.submission_guidelines: This assessment will be submitted via the course's Learn.UQ site.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

assessments.task_description: Reflection is an important skill in agile approaches. While in agile approaches it is undertaken with others, here this assessment is an individual activity. The task is to write a reflective report that is to cover the areas stated on the task sheet available on Blackboard.
assessments.submission_guidelines: This assessment will be submitted via the course's Learn.UQ site.
assessments.deferral_or_extension: You may be able to apply for an extension.
assessments.late_submission: A penalty of 10% of the maximum possible mark will be deducted per 24 hours from time submission is due for up to 7 days. After 7 days, you will receive a mark of 0.
assessments.additional_info: You may be able to apply for an extension.

learning_activities.topic:
Topic 1.1: The BA project management journey

This topic introduces business analytics and describes skills for planning business analytics projects.

Live Session: This session will focus on staff and student introductions, outlining course objectives, reviewing assessments, and discussing business analytics projects.

Self-directed learning: Students need to complete this week's self-directed material before the live session.

Learning outcomes: L01
